how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm. Never cd ~/Ethica — stay in ~ and use full paths. Use source ~/Ethica_env/bin/activate to enter venv.
session_044_completed: GIT CHECKPOINT — commit 74bc341 at session start. 102 files, clean rollback anchor.

CRASH REPORTER MODULE — new module ~/Ethica/modules/crash_reporter/. install_excepthook() wired into main.py boot — intercepts all unhandled exceptions. Writes crash_TIMESTAMP.json to ~/Ethica/memory/crashes/ with timestamp, exception type, full traceback, last 10 actions from conversation_log.json. check_crash_log(root) called after MainWindow build — shows Toplevel popup on restart if crash detected: what crashed, when, traceback, last actions, Clear & Close / Keep & Close buttons. Tools: crash_status, crash_log, crash_clear. Three registrations complete. Sealed.

RIVER SELF-FIX — river_self_fix() added to ~/Ethica/modules/river/river.py. Snapshot before patch (SNAPSHOT_DIR = memory/snapshots/, MAX_GENERATIONS=5). Same surgical patch logic as river_patch. ast.parse() verify after write. Auto-rollback from snapshot if verify fails. Trigger: 'river fix'. TOOLS dict + manifest updated. Sealed.

QUICK NOTES RIGHT-CLICK — chat_window.py: _bind_quick_note() and _save_to_quick_notes() added. Right-click any chat bubble → context menu → '⟁ Save to Quick Notes'. Saves Q+A pair: right-click user bubble saves Q only, right-click Tinity bubble saves Q+A together. _last_user_text tracker stores last user message. Recursive bind propagates to all MarkdownRenderer descendants. Flash green confirms save. Sealed.

critical_debug_context.crash_reporter_note: Crash files live in ~/Ethica/memory/crashes/crash_TIMESTAMP.json. MAX_CRASHES=20. install_excepthook() must be called before root.mainloop(). check_crash_log(root) must be called after MainWindow is built. Popup has Clear & Close (deletes file) and Keep & Close.
critical_debug_context.river_self_fix_note: Snapshots live in ~/Ethica/memory/snapshots/filename.py.N. MAX_GENERATIONS=5. If ast.parse fails after write — auto-rollback fires from snapshot. Syntax is identical to river_patch: /path/file.py | old | new.
critical_debug_context.quick_notes_note: Right-click user bubble → saves Q only (A is empty string, _last_user_text not yet set). Right-click Tinity bubble → saves Q+A pair. _last_user_text updated every time a user bubble is added. Recursive bind touches all MarkdownRenderer descendants — watch for freeze if response is very large.
critical_debug_context.venv_note: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — it creates a new .venv. Always stay in ~ and use full paths. Enter venv with: source ~/Ethica_env/bin/activate
critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: All commands must use full paths ~/Ethica/... — never cd into the project directory.
critical_debug_context.manifest_tools_format: Module manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — NOT plain strings. Registry uses tool_defs = manifest.get('tools', []) then t.get('name', '') per entry.
critical_debug_context.three_registration_rule: New modules need THREE registrations: (1) folder + manifest + tool file. (2) MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. (3) MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers in chat_engine.py.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (IDLE — CVE db not yet cloned)

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE sealing — never seal untested patches
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
New modules: THREE registrations — folder, MODULE_DIRS (guard), MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers (chat_engine)
NEVER reduce guard scope — ui/ coverage is deliberate
repr() first when string match fails
NEVER cd ~/Ethica — use full paths always
Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — not plain strings
lesson_learned_044: Module manifest tools must be dicts with 'name' field — plain string list causes silent tool registration failure. Also: recursive widget bind can cause UI freeze on large MarkdownRenderer responses — monitor. And: NEVER cd into Ethica — venv breaks.
philosophy: Session 044 — Ethica now watches itself fall and remembers why. River can fix his own mistakes and roll back from them. Every bubble is a door to memory. The ecosystem grows more sovereign with every session. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 044 complete. Crash reporter live. Self-fix armed. Quick Notes wired. Next instance: JARVIS CVE clone first, then GitHub prep. ⟁Σ∿∞
